results.title: QuickQuill: Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac
results.content:
Andras Czeizel

Recording the demo with Wi-Fi turned off is probably the best possible proof for this product :) I have never really liked meeting bots sitting in the participant list either, especially when the conversation may include private product or business details. keeping the recording, transcription, translation, and summary entirely on the Mac feels like the right trust model.

The one-time price is refreshing too. Curious how QuickQuill reliably captures both sides of a call across different apps without installing a virtual audio driver, and how well speaker separation works when several people are talking?

Report [...] Hi Product Hunt, I'm a solo developer in Japan👋 I built QuickQuill because I never got comfortable with meeting notetakers. You invite some company's bot into the call, it sits there in the participant list, everyone acts like that's normal, and the recording ends up on a server you never see. The apps say they won't look at it, and maybe they don't. I just didn't want work conversations to depend on that kind of trust. QuickQuill does everything on your Mac. It records both sides of the meeting, transcribes it, shows live subtitles with translation if you need them, and writes a summary when you stop. Nothing appears in the participant list because nothing joins the call. I recorded the demo on my M1 Mac with Wi-Fi turned off.  It requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon. Dictation is free [...] Subscribe

Launching today

QuickQuill

# QuickQuill

Launching today

## Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac

8 followers

## Private, on-device meeting notes for Mac

8 followers

Visit website

AI notetakers

•

Transcription

QuickQuill records your meetings and turns them into transcripts and summaries, and nothing is ever sent to the cloud. No bot joins the call, and it keeps working with Wi-Fi off, which is how the demo video was recorded. It also shows live subtitles with translation while you record, and there's push-to-talk dictation for any app. No account, no subscription. Dictation is free forever, and a single $49 purchase unlocks the full meeting workflow. Requires macOS 26 on Apple Silicon.

## Why Businesses Love It

QR Sign [...] No credit card required • Cancel anytime

## With QuickFeedback

### Identify recurring complaints and trends

See what customers are happy about and what needs your attention.

### Receive AI-powered sentiment analysis

Understand the tone behind every response with built-in AI.

### Get automatic email summaries and reports

Stay updated with key insights delivered straight to your inbox.

### Respond faster to customer concerns

Address negative feedback quickly and turn unhappy customers into loyal ones.

## Two ways to collect feedback

Use QuickFeedback in person with QR codes, or automatically after appointments.

### QR Feedback

Perfect for walk-ins and in-person businesses.

Instant feedback on-site

No app or login

Great for restaurants, cafes, retail, car washes [...] Fix issues fast

Solve problems before they affect your reputation.

More happy customers

Give every customer an easy way to leave a public review, on Google, Yelp, Tripadvisor, or anywhere else.

AI-powered insights

Spot trends and improve based on real feedback.

## From Feedback to Action

Collecting feedback is only the beginning.

​

QuickFeedback helps you understand what customers are saying, spot recurring issues, and take action before small problems affect the customer experience.

​

Whether it's slow service, a product issue, or a staff training opportunity, feedback is organized in one place so you can focus on what matters most.

The result is simple: better customer experiences, stronger reputations, and more opportunities to earn positive public reviews.
